title: Create ARCHITECTURE.md documenting system design
description: Architecture gap: 'ARCHITECTURE.md does not exist'. Create ARCHITECTURE.md at project root documenting: (1) StorageBackend interface contract and design decisions, (2) Backend selection flow (createBackend auto-detection chain), (3) AgenticFileSystem class architecture (readOnly mode, permissions, tool definitions), (4) Error type hierarchy (NotFoundError/PermissionDeniedError/IOError), (5) Cross-backend consistency guarantees. This provides the formal architecture reference that PRD and test suites reference.
